description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, dark wooden handle with a gentle ergonomic curve for improved grip and control. The handle displays a natural wood grain pattern, transitioning into a solid, matte-black metal head. The axe head is broad and wedge-shaped, with a single sharp cutting edge and a flat poll on the opposite side, suitable for splitting or chopping tasks. The blade is securely mounted onto the handle, with no visible fasteners, suggesting a traditional wedged fit. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or branding. This tool is commonly found in urban garages, workshops, or maintenance sheds for chopping wood or similar tasks.
description: A sturdy hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a matte-black wedge-shaped metal head, designed for chopping or splitting tasks. The utilitarian design features a single sharp edge and a flat poll, with visible wood grain and no decorative markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow profile of the axe head and the straight alignment of the handle, highlighting the thickness of the blade.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full curvature of the wooden handle and the broad, wedge-shaped blade with a sharp edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the poll of the axe head and the handle's grain, emphasizing the secure mounting of the blade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the handle's curve and the blade's geometry, showing the flat poll and the single cutting edge.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with ergonomic grip, oval cross-section, visible wood grain, and a flared end for secure handling.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a flat poll and no beard, matte black finish, and a broad cutting edge.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fit with the blade mounted onto the handle, no visible fasteners.
